campaign.name: Northgrid — Winter Technical Drop
campaign.message: Built for the city that doesn't slow down.
campaign.targetAudience: Urban Gen Z and millennials 18-32 into technical streetwear, layering, all-weather commuters, design-literate
campaign.tone: moody, editorial, high-contrast, premium streetwear, cold blue-grey palette

products.name: Northgrid Stormshell Parka
products.description: 3-layer waterproof shell parka with seam-taped construction, fleece-lined chest pocket, oversized urban silhouette. Recycled face fabric.

products.name: Northgrid Thermal Cargo Pant
products.description: Insulated technical cargo pant with articulated knees, zip thigh pockets, windproof front panels. Engineered for sub-freezing commutes.
